setup: I'm afraid for the calendar.
My wife said I should do lunges to stay in shape.
punchline: That would be a big step forward.

setup: Why do fathers take an extra pair of pants when they go golfing?
punchline: In case they get a hole in one.

setup: Singing in the shower is fun until you get soap in your mouth.
What do you call a factory that sells passable products?

punchline: I'm tired of finding your X.

setup: What did the ocean say to the beach?

punchline: You put a little boogie in it.

setup: What's the best thing about Switzerland?
punchline: I don't know, but the flag is a big plus.

setup: I'm reading a book on anti-gravity.
Did you hear about the guy who invented the Lifesaver?
punchline: They say he made a mint.

setup: I used to be a baker, but I couldn't make enough dough.
Why did the scarecrow win an award?
punchline: Because he was outstanding in his field.

punchline: I'll let you know which one comes first.

setup: What did the buffalo say to his son when he left for college?

punchline: My wife asked, 'Is it to scale?' I said, 'No, it's to look at.'

setup: I told my doctor I broke my arm in two places.
punchline: He told me to stop going to those places.

punchline: For holding up a pair of pants.

setup: What did one wall say to the other?
punchline: I'll meet you at the corner.

punchline: Because if they flew over the bay, they’d be bagels.
